name: session_manager
description: Manages work sessions with unique IDs. Creates session workspaces, tracks file changes and agent/tool usage, appends notes, and closes sessions with a final summary. Sessions are indexed in a workspace/session_index.json file and each gets a dedicated directory with output/ and temp/ subdirectories.

session_id.description: Session ID (format: YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS). Required for all actions except 'create', 'list', and 'active'.

description.description: Human-readable description. Used when creating a session or closing one as a close summary.

data.description: Payload for the action. log_change expects {file, action, summary, diff_preview}; log_agent expects {agent_id}; log_tool expects {tool_name}; add_note expects {note}; close expects {summary}; create optionally accepts {description, tags}; list optionally accepts {status_filter}.
